rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARGUERITA L. RUBEL TRUST
rulings.Rulings: PETITIONER DANIEL RUBEL MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Daniel Rubel's Motion for Summary Adjudication of the Fourth Cause of Action is denied. There are triable issues of fact as to the existence of a contract, performance under the contract, and damages. In addition, summary judgment is denied based upon CCP section 437c(e). The request for judicial notice of the Petition to Determine Validity of Trust, etc is granted. The objection to the Declaration of David W. Baer filed December 5, 2011 is sustained, except with regard to Exhibit 1 attached to the Declaration which was not produced by Daniel Rubel prior to December 1, 2011. However, Exhibit 1 is not determinative of the Court's ruling in this matter. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) no later than 5:00 p.m. on 12/8/11.
